problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor may resolve Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
